- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: File exists at .github/copilot-instructions.md.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Project is an open source, cross-platform Git desktop app with a worktree-first MVP. Stack chosen: Tauri v2 + SvelteKit + TypeScript.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Scaffolded in the current directory /Users/liam/Projects/sproutgit using create-tauri-app with Svelte TypeScript and npm.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Updated app identity to SproutGit (package name sprout-git, Tauri productName/title/identifier updated) and refreshed README with project-specific setup and run instructions.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No required extensions were provided by project setup metadata, so none were installed.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Installed dependencies and prerequisites. Ran npm run check, npm run build, and cargo check successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Created and ran a VS Code task for development with nvm support: zsh -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && npm run tauri dev'.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: Launched in debug/development mode using npm run tauri dev.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md are present and updated. HTML comments have been removed from this checklist file.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
